context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the implement-hotwire instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Verify degraded mode** — disable JavaScript in browser DevTools (or run `rails test:system` with a headless driver set to `no_js`) and confirm forms submit, links navigate, and data persists correctly without JS.
